title: MULTIMODAL ROBOTIC SYSTEM
what: Full-stack architecture and development of a multimodal robotic system
Bio-inspired air and underwater gait behavior — chassis development for transitioning media
how: Compliant materials, DFA-driven mechanical design, and subtractive manufacturing for actuator and structural fabrication
ROS2-based control software and sensor integration
Automated/Systematic testing procedures across air, underwater, and transitioning media
results: Expected: novel multimodal gait behavior characterization across air and underwater media
Ongoing: autonomous air and underwater gait behavior testing; full-system integration from mechanics to software stack
